positive: A stylish, minimalist illustration of a whimsical space adventure. Central composition features a group of stylized celestial animals (a crescent moon sloth, a nebula fox, and a comet bunny) floating among stylized planets and constellations. The style is neo-art deco, vector-graphic, with bold, clean outlines and flat, vibrant colors (deep indigo, emerald green, burnt orange, and turquoise). The composition uses strong negative space and symmetrical elements. The lighting is crisp and even, designed for high contrast and perfect visibility when printed on apparel. Suitable for a full-body repeat pattern or central chest print.
